name: customer_name
description: Name of the customer who placed the order

name: amount
description: Total monetary value of the order

name: status
description: Current processing status of the order

name: order_date
description: Calendar date when the order was placed

name: warehouse_id
description: Identifier for the warehouse handling the order

name: batch_date
description: Audit column to identify the record is newly inserted.

name: processed_dttm
description: System timestamp indicating when the record was loaded
